genuine_leave_8b_out_closed_form.fitted_scalar: fit_BW (two-pillar effective decode BW), re-derived from {1B,3B} ONLY
genuine_leave_8b_out_closed_form.note: engine 24.2 anchor untouched; this is the TRUE size hold-out (8B never in the fit).

engine_path.CAVEAT: the engine's 24.2 backbone is regressed across ALL sizes incl. 8B in Phase 1 -> PARTLY IN-SAMPLE; the genuinely out-of-sample content is the parameter-free CIM-compute correction. Do NOT read the engine 8B error as a pure hold-out.

finding: genuine leave-8B-out closed form predicts 8B at 9.5%; the full engine (parameter-free compute correction on the partly-in-sample 24.2 backbone) predicts 8B at 3.1% — within 15% and not worse than the closed form. If the engine were worse = Gate-6c (fix M1/M2/M3, not integration).
